action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline MLP with 512 hidden dim, 6 blocks achieved val_r2=0.9178 after 5 epochs (~85s/epoch). Each epoch takes ~85s, so 5 epochs = ~7.5 min. Analysis: The model is still improving (loss declining). I should submit eval to get baseline score, then scale up. With ~3.86h remaining and ~85s/epoch, I can do roughly 160 more epochs total. Key improvements to try: 1) Larger model (hidden_dim=1024, more blocks), 2) Train longer. Let me first submit eval to get baseline, then train a larger model for more epochs.
